title: StructuredError
description: Typed failure payload emitted by the MCP server on isError=true (FR-002). NEVER a bare 'Operation failed' string — enforced by AST lint on server modules and by this schema at runtime.

errorCategory.description: Closed category set. Unknown categories are a schema error — never silently passed through.

isRetryable.description: Drives the agent's local retry vs. escalation branch.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation. Distinct from errorCategory/isRetryable which are machine-branchable.

retry_after_seconds.description: Hint for backoff when isRetryable=true. Null when not applicable.
